title: Project Engineer - Marine Works
description:
About the role

McConnell Dowell is looking to hire Project Engineer / Site Engineer for our civil marine works project in East of Singapore.


Key Responsibilities

  • Assisting Senior Project Engineer and Construction Manager with daily site activities.
  • Monitoring/reporting site progress (direct employees and subcontract works).
  • Formulation of procedures for construction activities.
  • Plan the works and develop look-a-head programmes.
  • Liaise with the design coordination team to resolve technical discrepancies including preparing and submitting technical queries and meeting with design consultants as required.
  • Manage the schedule of shop drawings and monitor the output of drafters.
  • Plan the equipment and material requirements and raise purchase requisitions as required.
  • Mentor and manage Site Engineers assigned to your zone/works areas.
  • Review the authority approvals required ahead of the works and ensure submissions are made such that the clearances can be achieved before works start.

About You

To be considered for this role, you will have;

  • Recognized relevant Degree qualifications.
  • 5 years of experience in managing civil marine works i.e. pier, wharf, jetty, bridge etc. or similar marine works.
  • Strong in communication between cross-functional teams.
  • Able to work an alternate 6-day work week.
  • Transport pickup at Tanah Merah MRT and other designated pickup points.


If you are interested in adding value and contributing success to building a key infrastructure project, we encourage you to apply for this exciting opportunity with McConnell Dowell.


About Us

McConnell Dowell – Creative Construction


Our purpose is Providing a Better Life. We do that through delivering projects that connect, support and sustain communities, and through providing career opportunities that challenge, reward and grow our people.


From remote major resources and energy projects to city-shaping transport and water infrastructure, we have constructed thousands of high-quality, complex projects for our customers and communities over more than 60 years, in Australia, New Zealand, the Pacific Islands and Southeast Asia.


Why join us?


The work you’ll do will have a tangible positive impact on people’s lives, including yours. The diversity of our projects, roles and locations means greater development opportunities. We invest in our people to set and reach personal and professional goals and we have some of the best mentoring minds in the business to help you do that. Because when you grow, we all grow.


McConnell Dowell actively seeks and celebrates diversity, inclusion, and individuality. In a culture low on ego and high on support, we encourage everyone to make an impact. We're big enough to take on community-shaping projects, but agile enough for you to have an influence on how we do things.


So, join us, be you, and help us create better together. Apply now!


This role is being sourced through McConnell Dowell directly and not accepting applications via external recruitment agencies.

postedCompany.description:
McCONNELL DOWELL SOUTH EAST ASIA PRIVATE LIMITED

Founded in 1961, McConnell Dowell is a world class engineering, construction, building and maintenance company, which operates throughout Australia, New Zealand and the Pacific, South East Asia and the Middle East.  Our business comprises of Pipeline, Tunnel & Underground, Civil & Marine, HSEQ and Rail divisions.  Our reputation has been built on undertaking challenging and complex projects  we pride ourselves on our engineering excellence.

We have an excellent opportunity for a high performing individual to join our team based in Singapore office.
